guidance.name: Guidance
guidance.description: Touch a willing creature to grant divine insight. Before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add it to one ability check of its choice.

vicious mockery.name: Vicious Mockery
vicious mockery.description: Hurl magically-laced insults at a creature. On a failed WIS save, the target takes psychic damage and has disadvantage on its next attack roll.
vicious mockery.effect: 1d4 psychic damage + disadvantage on next attack
vicious mockery.limitations: WIS save negates, creature must hear you, 60 ft range

mending.name: Mending
mending.description: Repair a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, a shattered blade, or a torn cloak. The break can be no larger than 1 foot in any dimension.
mending.effect: Repairs one break or tear up to 1 ft

prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitation
prestidigitation.description: Minor magical tricks: create sparks, a puff of wind, faint music, or an odd odor. Can chill, warm, or flavor up to 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour.
prestidigitation.limitations: 10 ft range, effects are minor and cosmetic

druidcraft.name: Druidcraft
druidcraft.description: Create minor nature-themed effects: predict weather for 24 hours, make a flower bloom, create a tiny sensory effect like falling leaves or a puff of wind.
druidcraft.effect: Weather prediction, plant growth, minor sensory effects
druidcraft.limitations: 30 ft range, effects are cosmetic, no damage

produce flame.name: Produce Flame
produce flame.description: A flickering flame appears in your hand, shedding bright light in 10 ft and dim light for 10 more. You can hurl it as a ranged spell attack for fire damage.
produce flame.effect: 1d8 fire damage (ranged attack) or light source
produce flame.limitations: 30 ft range when thrown, spell ends when hurled

shillelagh.name: Shillelagh
shillelagh.description: Enchant a wooden club or quarterstaff. For 1 minute it becomes magical, deals 1d8 damage, and you use your Wisdom modifier for attack and damage rolls instead of Strength.
shillelagh.effect: 1d8 magical bludgeoning, use WIS for attacks
shillelagh.limitations: 1 minute duration, wooden weapon only, bonus action to cast

hunter's mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunter's mark.description: Mark a creature you can see. Each time you hit the marked target with a weapon attack, you deal extra damage. If the target drops to 0 HP, you can move the mark to a new creature as a bonus action.
hunter's mark.effect: +1d6 damage per weapon hit on marked target
hunter's mark.limitations: Concentration, 1 hour, 90 ft range, bonus action to cast/move

entangle.name: Entangle
entangle.description: Grasping weeds and vines erupt in a 20-foot square. Creatures in the area must make a STR save or be restrained. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration.
entangle.effect: Restrain creatures in 20 ft square (STR save)
entangle.limitations: Concentration, 1 minute, 90 ft range, affects allies too

goodberry.name: Goodberry
goodberry.description: Create up to 10 magical berries. Eating one berry restores 1 HP and provides enough nourishment to sustain a creature for one day. Berries lose potency after 24 hours.
goodberry.effect: 10 berries, each heals 1 HP + full day nourishment
goodberry.limitations: Berries expire in 24 hours, action to eat one

animal friendship.name: Animal Friendship
animal friendship.description: Convince a beast you mean no harm. The beast must make a WIS save or be charmed by you for 24 hours. The spell ends early if you or your companions harm it.
animal friendship.limitations: WIS save, beasts only (INT 4+), broken by harm, 30 ft range

charm person.name: Charm Person
charm person.description: A humanoid must make a WIS save or be charmed by you for 1 hour. It regards you as a friendly acquaintance. It has advantage on the save if you're fighting it.
charm person.limitations: WIS save (advantage if hostile), humanoids only, broken by harm

cure wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure wounds.description: Touch a creature to restore hit points. The amount equals 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. Heals an additional 1d8 per spell slot level above 1st.
cure wounds.limitations: Touch range, no effect on undead or constructs

healing word.name: Healing Word
healing word.description: Speak a word of healing to a creature you can see within range. It regains hit points equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting modifier. Cast as a bonus action.
healing word.effect: Heal 1d4 + spellcasting mod HP (bonus action, ranged)
healing word.limitations: 60 ft range, no undead/constructs, bonus action

detect magic.name: Detect Magic
detect magic.description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. You can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object bearing magic, and learn its school of magic.
detect magic.effect: Detect magic within 30 ft, identify school

command.name: Command
command.description: Speak a one-word command to a creature. On a failed WIS save, it must follow the command on its next turn. Common commands: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt.
command.effect: Force creature to obey one-word command
command.limitations: WIS save, 60 ft range, undead immune, must understand language

bless.name: Bless
bless.description: Bless up to three creatures within range. For the duration, whenever a target makes an attack roll or saving throw, it can roll a d4 and add the result.
bless.effect: +1d4 to attack rolls and saves for 3 targets

divine favor.name: Divine Favor
divine favor.description: Your weapon radiates divine energy. For the duration, your weapon attacks deal extra radiant damage on each hit.
divine favor.limitations: Concentration, 1 minute, bonus action to cast

thunderwave.name: Thunderwave
thunderwave.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube must make a CON save or take thunder damage and be pushed 10 feet away from you.
thunderwave.limitations: CON save for half/no push, self-origin, audible 300 ft away

faerie fire.name: Faerie Fire
faerie fire.description: Objects and creatures in a 20-foot cube are outlined in blue, green, or violet light. Affected creatures can't benefit from being invisible, and attack rolls against them have advantage.
faerie fire.effect: Outline creatures in light, grant advantage on attacks against them
faerie fire.limitations: Concentration, 1 minute, DEX save negates, 60 ft range

speak with animals.name: Speak with Animals
speak with animals.description: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration. Their intelligence limits the information they can share.
speak with animals.limitations: Beasts only, limited by animal intelligence, ritual

fog cloud.name: Fog Cloud
fog cloud.description: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The area is heavily obscured. Wind of 10+ mph disperses it.
fog cloud.limitations: Concentration, 1 hour, 120 ft range, wind disperses

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: Roll 5d8; the total is the HP of creatures this spell can affect. Starting with the lowest-HP creature in range, each falls unconscious until the spell ends or they take damage.
sleep.effect: Put creatures to sleep (5d8 HP worth)
sleep.limitations: 90 ft range, undead/elves immune, lowest HP affected first

heroism.name: Heroism
heroism.description: Touch a willing creature and imbue it with bravery. For the duration, the creature is immune to being frightened and gains temporary HP equal to your spellcasting modifier at the start of each of its turns.
heroism.effect: Immune to frightened + temp HP each turn

dissonant whispers.name: Dissonant Whispers
dissonant whispers.description: Whisper a discordant melody only the target can hear. On a failed WIS save, the target takes psychic damage and must use its reaction to move away from you.
dissonant whispers.limitations: WIS save for half/no movement, 60 ft, must hear you

shield of faith.name: Shield of Faith
shield of faith.description: A shimmering field appears around a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.
shield of faith.limitations: Concentration, 10 minutes, 60 ft range, bonus action
